title: Dirt Tabs UI
description: Replaces Minecraft's UI with the Dirt Tabs introduced in 1.19.4
body:
# """Modernizes""" Minecraft's UI in an Official Way

Do you dislike the current UI? Prefer the <sub>relatively</sub> new Textures in the <sub>relatively</sub> new World Creation Screen? Feel like it needs an *upgrade*? **This pack is for you!**

![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)

![gifpreview](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/saQg1aq5/images/aedd3fd89f462ea5b7ea3da9c1f714e0fdccd921.gif)
